current.next_drop_tagline: 3 PM energy. Juice boxes. Homework avoided.
current.manifesto_body: The 90s didn't need to explain itself. The title cards didn't shout. The shows started and you knew.
current.manifesto_pullquote: We make shirts for the people who were there — and have since developed taste.
current.manifesto_close: One drop at a time. Numbered. Limited. When it's gone, it's gone. The archive is in your closet.
